evals.prompt: Our demo request form has 8 fields and we're getting a 12% completion rate. Industry average is around 20-25%. What should we cut?
evals.expected_output: Should apply the field audit framework. Should identify which fields to remove or make optional. Should apply the value exchange table to determine appropriate field count for a demo request (4-6). Should recommend keeping first name, email, and 1-2 qualifying questions. Should suggest moving company size and phone to post-submission. Should recommend new CTA copy for the submit button.
assertions: References appropriate field count for demo requests
